mapper.update: update users set real_name = #{realName},id_card = #{idCard} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE (phone = #{phone} OR username = #{username}) AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (phone, username, password, role, create_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{phone}, #{username}, #{password}, 0, NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT id, phone, password, username, avatar, role FROM users WHERE phone = #{phone} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
